# TelehealthPick

TelehealthPick is an independent telehealth comparison platform. We compare online medical services across ED treatment, weight loss (GLP-1), hair loss, women's health, and mental health.

## What this site does

We help users find the right telehealth platform for their needs by comparing pricing, medication options, consultation processes, and user experience across major US telehealth providers including Hims, Roman, Ro, Hers, Nurx, BetterHelp, Rex MD, and Keeps.

We earn affiliate commissions when users click through and sign up with partner platforms. Our rankings are based on independent scoring criteria — pricing, medication selection, consultation quality, and flexibility. No brand pays to appear first.

## Content

- Comparison pages: side-by-side versus pages for major platforms (e.g. Hims vs Roman)
- Review pages: in-depth reviews of individual platforms
- Best-of pages: curated picks by use case (e.g. cheapest tadalafil online)
- Educational guides: informational content about medications and conditions
- Interactive quiz: personalised platform matching based on user answers

## Medical disclaimer

TelehealthPick does not provide medical advice. All content is for informational purposes only. We are not licensed medical providers. Users should consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting any medication.

## Coverage areas

- ED / Men's health: tadalafil, sildenafil, online ED prescriptions
- GLP-1 / Weight loss: semaglutide, tirzepatide, online weight loss programs
- Hair loss: finasteride, minoxidil, online hair loss treatment
- Women's health: birth control, menopause/HRT, UTI treatment
- Mental health: online therapy, psychiatric medication management
